popularStory.description: He was known historically as Sir Robert Latham, The Elder. In 1249, he had grant of the custody of the honor and castle of Lancaster, an office of dignity almost commensurate with that of an Earl Pala …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Lathom於1198年12月23日出生在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可時，他的父親Richard FitzRobert de Lathom44歲，母親Alice Nelson52歲。他於1220年之前與Lady Amicia de Alfreton在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1290年之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Lathom于1198年12月23日出生在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可时，他的父亲Richard FitzRobert de Lathom44岁，母亲Alice Nelson52岁。他于1220年之前与Lady Amicia de Alfreton在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1290年之后在他的家乡，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Lathom was born on 23 December 1198, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard FitzRobert de Lathom, was 44 and his mother, Alice Nelson, was 52. He married Lady Amicia de Alfreton before 1220, in Lathom House, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died after 1290, in his hometown, and was buried in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Lathom est né le 23 décembre 1198, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard FitzRobert de Lathom, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice Nelson, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Lady Amicia de Alfreton avant 1220, à Lathom House, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé après 1290, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Lathom am 23. Dezember 1198 in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard FitzRobert de Lathom 44 und seine Mutter Alice Nelson 52. Er hat vor 1220 in Lathom House, Lancashire, England Lady Amicia de Alfreton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach 1290 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Lathom è nato il il 23 dicembre 1198 nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard FitzRobert de Lathom, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Alice Nelson, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Lady Amicia de Alfreton prima del 1220, nel Lathom House, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1290, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Lathomが1198年12月23日にイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクで生まれた時，父Richard FitzRobert de Lathomは44歳，母Alice Nelsonは52歳であった。1220年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム ホーウゼでLady Amicia de Alfretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1290年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Lathom(이)가 1198년 12월 23일 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard FitzRobert de Lathom(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Nelson(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1220년 이전 영국 랭카실르 래톰 허스에서 Lady Amicia de Alfreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1290년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Lathom nasceu em 23 de dezembro de 1198, em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard FitzRobert de Lathom, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice Nelson, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Amicia de Alfreton antes 1220, em Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1290, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Lathom родился 23 декабря 1198 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard FitzRobert de Lathom было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Nelson, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Amicia de Alfreton перед 1220 г. в местности латом хоус, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер после 1290 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Lathom nació el 23 de diciembre de 1198, en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard FitzRobert de Lathom, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice Nelson, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Lady Amicia de Alfreton antes de 1220, en Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1290, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
